title: Learning to Route Among Specialized Experts for Zero-Shot Generalization

method.name: PHATGOOSE
method.description: A method for routing among specialized experts that makes adaptive per-token and per-module expert choices

routing_mechanism.selection: top-k routing based on dot product with activations

findings: PHATGOOSE outperforms other methods for recycling experts
PHATGOOSE nearly matches the performance of an oracle routing scheme
Can improve zero-shot generalization of a base language model

context.background: Proliferation of fine-tuned 'expert' models specialized to particular tasks or domains
context.peft_adoption: Over 17,000 adapters based on the peft library on Hugging Face Model Hub
context.advantage: Provides a path to decentralized development of generalist language models

figures.figure_1: Shows average performance of different multitask training and expert routing methods
figures.figure_2: Visualizes how PHATGOOSE learns to route among specialized modules
